text: Bug #1-#21: calc_size leverage, sync SL/TP, race condition, smart_round, close order sz, int truncation, trail state reset, EMA filter removal, range seed, re-entry cooldown
Changed pairs STRK/FIL/SHIB/ETH/CRV → BTC/ETH/SOL/BNB. Strategy: EMA trend-following → Range Edge + RSI Reversal
Bug #33: WS_URL fixed from demo to live endpoint. Root cause of ALL prior anomalies.

Bug #34-#45: Rolling 4h range, real 1m candle RSI via REST, ADX trend filter, trail+server SL race, Telegram HTML, min SL distance, BTC correlation, open_time sync, server-side close journalling, ADX 25→40, DNS hijacking fix
Bot 2 (ws_stockcom.py) launched — COIN/CRCL/XAG/MSTR. Bot 3 (ws_crash_recovery.py) launched — ETH/SOL/DOGE/LINK/AVAX/ADA/SUI crash recovery
XAG disabled (WR 22%). MSTR flipped to reverse. Strategy flip logic implemented. wr_audit.py created.
WARP SOCKS5 proxy deployed (socks5://127.0.0.1:40000). ALL REST API calls routed through WARP. SL/TP no longer disappear.
wr_audit.py fixed: added rate limit delay + filter subType 5,6 only. CRCL/MSTR data now accurate.
MSTR disabled (WR 14% post-reverse). R:R raised: TP 65→75% range, MIN_NET_RR 1.5→2.0 (Bot 1). TP 2%→3% (Bot 2).
GitHub Pages dashboard launched: real-time equity, positions, WR, services, lessons, journal
